program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Define the acceptance gates that must pass before an H00 preflight evidence packet can close RP00 Product Constitution And AI Control Plane work as production_ready.
implemented_changes: Moves the current control-plane subphase to RP00.P00.M08.S02 in implemented state.

Adds h00_preflight_acceptance_gate_definition with required acceptance gates for field inventory binding, command receipts, H00 command id execution, blocked claims, gate outcome, no-real-data/no-write evidence, Claude dependency, human approval boundary, construction inspection, and next boundary.
Extends the RP00 validator to enforce the new acceptance gate definition while preserving RP00.P00.M08.S01 as a completed scope inventory.
Updates the control-plane README with the H00 preflight acceptance gate scope.
non_goals: Does not execute production mutation or runtime target writes.
Does not import or use real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data.
Does not approve generated output, AI write behavior, C00 replacement, human-approval replacement, M08 completion, or RP00 completion.
Does not widen Hermes H00 or Claude C00 authority.
claude_questions: Does h00_preflight_acceptance_gate_definition bind to RP00.P00.M08.S02 and define H00 preflight acceptance gates only?

Are required acceptance gates sufficient for preflight field presence, command receipts, H00 command id registration and execution, blocked claims, gate outcome, no-real-data, writes_product_state=false, Claude dependency, human approval boundary, construction inspection, and next boundary?
Does the validator preserve RP00.P00.M08.S01 as a completed scope inventory while making RP00.P00.M08.S02 the current acceptance gate definition?
Does the implementation avoid claims of production mutation, real-data import, generation output approval, C00 or human replacement, M08 completion, or RP00 completion?
risk_focus: Scope drift from H00 preflight evidence into product runtime behavior.
Validation theater where acceptance gates are listed but not enforced.
Confusing RP00.P00.M08.S01 scope inventory with RP00.P00.M08.S02 acceptance gate definition.
